mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT( id , file_name , file_path , file_org_type , link_id , main_model_id , memo , file_size , download_times , preview_times , size_dis , property_code , file_type , show_type , opener , open_time , deployment_id , activity_name , task_description , file_icon , is_file_view , convert_status , reason , convert_path , doc_content , doc_summary , valid , create_time , modify_time , creator , modifier ) values( #{id}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileOrgType}, #{linkId}, #{mainModelId}, #{memo}, #{fileSize}, #{downloadTimes}, #{previewTimes}, #{sizeDis}, #{propertyCode}, #{fileType}, #{showType}, #{opener}, #{openTime}, #{deploymentId}, #{activityName}, #{taskDescription}, #{fileIcon}, #{isFileView}, #{convertStatus}, #{reason}, #{convertPath}, #{docContent}, #{docSummary}, #{valid}, #{createTime}, #{modifyTime}, #{creator}, #{modifier} )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT WHERE VALID = '1'
AND link_id = #{linkId1}

SELECT * FROM FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT WHERE VALID = '1'
AND create_staff_id = #{createStaffId}

SELECT * FROM FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT WHERE VALID = '1'
AND opener = #{userName}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO /*+append_values */ FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT (id , file_name , file_path , file_org_type , link_id , main_model_id , memo , file_size , download_times , preview_times , size_dis , property_code , file_type , show_type , opener , open_time , deployment_id , activity_name , task_description , file_icon , is_file_view , convert_status , reason , convert_path , doc_content , doc_summary , valid , create_time , modify_time , creator , modifier )
(SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.filePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fileOrgType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.linkId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.mainModelId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.downloadTimes,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.previewTimes,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.sizeDis,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.propertyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fileType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.showType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.opener,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.openTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deploymentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.activityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fileIcon,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.isFileView,jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{item.convertStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.convertPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.docContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.docSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.valid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM DUAL )
mapper.update: UPDATE FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT SET VALID = '0' WHERE link_id = #{linkId} AND VALID = '1'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT WHERE ID = #{id} AND VALID = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT SET VALID = '0' WHERE file_path = #{filepath} AND VALID = '1'
UPDATE FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT SET VALID = '0' WHERE id = #{id} AND VALID = '1'
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT WHERE VALID = '1'
AND file_path = #{filePath}

SELECT * FROM FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT WHERE VALID = '1'
AND ID = #{fileId}
SELECT * FROM FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT WHERE VALID = '1' AND (CONVERT_STATUS IS NULL OR CONVERT_STATUS ='CONVERTING')
